value.value: Paste either:banktags,1,mybank,4151,1213,995,...or a Bank Memory TSV:Item id	Item name	Item quantity4151	Abyssal whip	1995	Coins	12345

attributeValue.value:
Paste either:

banktags,1,mybank,4151,1213,995,...

or a Bank Memory TSV:
Item id	Item name	Item quantity
4151	Abyssal whip	1
995	Coins	12345
